# Erigon

> Erigon is a high-performance Ethereum execution client known for its efficiency, modularity, and minimal disk footprint. It features an integrated consensus layer (Caplin), BitTorrent-based historical data distribution, and OtterSync for fast node synchronization.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2): Overview of Erigon's core features and architecture
- [Why Erigon?](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/get-started/readme/why-using-erigon): Key advantages over other Ethereum clients
- [Hardware Requirements](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/get-started/hardware-requirements): System requirements for running Erigon
- [Installation](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/get-started/installation): How to install Erigon from source or Docker
- [Migrating from Geth](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/get-started/migrating-from-geth): Guide for users switching from go-ethereum

## Running a Node

- [Basic Usage](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/basic-usage): Essential commands and options
- [Sync Modes](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/sync-modes): Full, archive, and minimal sync options
- [CLI Reference](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/configuring-erigon): Complete command-line flag reference
- [Supported Networks](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/supported-networks): Ethereum mainnet, testnets, and L2s
- [Docker Compose](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/docker-compose): Running Erigon with Docker

## JSON-RPC API

- [RPC Service Overview](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon): How to interact with Erigon via RPC
- [eth namespace](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/eth): Standard Ethereum JSON-RPC methods
- [erigon namespace](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/erigon): Erigon-specific RPC methods
- [debug namespace](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/debug): Debugging and tracing methods
- [trace namespace](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/trace): OpenEthereum-compatible tracing
- [txpool namespace](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/txpool): Transaction pool inspection
- [gRPC API](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/interacting-with-erigon/grpc): Low-level gRPC interface for advanced use

## Architecture & Modules

- [Caplin](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/caplin): Integrated consensus layer client
- [RPC Daemon](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/modules/rpc-daemon): Separate RPC service module
- [TxPool](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/modules/txpool): Transaction pool module
- [Sentry](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/modules/sentry): P2P networking module
- [Downloader](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/modules/downloader): BitTorrent-based data downloader

## Staking

- [Staking with Caplin](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/staking/caplin): Using the integrated consensus client as validator
- [External Consensus Client](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/staking/external-consensus-client-as-validator): Using Lighthouse, Prysm, etc.

## Optional

- [Performance Tricks](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/performance-tricks): Optimization tips for production
- [Optimizing Storage](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/optimizing-storage): Reducing disk usage
- [Security](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/security): Security best practices
- [Otterscan](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/fundamentals/otterscan): Block explorer for Erigon
- [Contributing](https://docs.erigon.tech/erigon/v3.2/about/contributing): How to contribute to Erigon

## Source Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon): Main source code repository
- [Releases](https://github.com/erigontech/erigon/releases): Download binaries and release notes
- [Docker Hub](https://hub.docker.com/r/erigontech/erigon): Official Docker images
